reasoning: The order is marked Complete and Shipped with full payment captured, but there is no visible tracking information or delivery confirmation details on the order view, nor any staff notes providing context about prior delivery issues. Since the customer claims the package was marked delivered but not received, this requires further investigation (carrier tracking review, proof of delivery, and possible address verification) before a refund can be approved or denied. Escalating to logistics/support for delivery investigation is appropriate.
